canonical_name: Jun proto-oncogene, AP-1 transcription factor subunit
step_rationale: Inflammatory transcription hub; regulates immune activation and vascular remodeling.
mechanism: JUN orchestrates inflammatory gene programs destabilizing atherosclerotic plaques.

references.title: Identification of biomarkers associated with coronary artery disease and non-alcoholic fatty liver disease by bioinformatics analysis and machine learning.
Single-cell transcriptomic analysis of peripheral blood mononuclear cells reveals key immune responses in ST-segment elevation myocardial infarction.
Integrated analysis of gene expression changes associated with coronary artery disease.
